name: trytond-account-invoice

metadata.name: trytond-account-invoice
classifiers: Intended Audience :: Financial and Insurance Industry
License :: OSI Approved :: GNU General Public License v3 or later (GPLv3+)

documentation:
######################
Account Invoice Module
######################

The *Account Invoice Module* adds the concept of invoicing to Tryton.
It allows the creation of customer and supplier invoices, and can handle the
payment terms related to the invoices and show when they have been paid.

methods.name: trytond.modules.account_invoice.payment_term.PaymentTerm.compute
documentation:
Calculate payment terms and return a list of tuples
with (date, amount) for each payment term line.

amount must be a Decimal used for the calculation.

documentation: Return move line

documentation: Compute account move for the invoice and return the created move

documentation: Return list of lines and the remainder to make reconciliation.

methods.name: trytond.modules.account_invoice.invoice.Invoice.pay_invoice
documentation:
Adds a payment of amount to an invoice using the journal, date and
description.
If overpayment is set, then only the amount minus the overpayment is
used to pay off the invoice.
Returns the payment lines.

methods.name: trytond.modules.account_invoice.invoice.Invoice.print_invoice
documentation: Generate invoice report and store it in invoice_report field.

documentation: Return values to credit invoice.

methods.name: trytond.modules.account_invoice.invoice.Invoice.credit
documentation:
Credit invoices and return ids of new invoices.
Return the list of new invoice
